title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #17, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #8 as the scene develops across pages 4–7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: oh my gosh!! A marine captured Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ... NO WAY!!! WHAT SHOULD WE DO!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: we've never seen anything like this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is getting out of hand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: crap, the marines are already here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're sorry we attempted to mug you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Thanks for showing me the way!! Later!!
